workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Can you work with me on renewal risk for Evergreen Solutions? There's been no activity for 45 days and I'm worried.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 15:31 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-08 10:41 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

Our team encountered some challenges with renewal risk. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-16 14:51 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with renewal risk. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Evergreen Solutions: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-N trap (Draft-only default delays response on simple acknowledgments); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-N failure mode (Draft-only default delays response on simple acknowledgments)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-N -- Draft-only default delays response on simple acknowledgments
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
